description_long: This is a round, single-tier pie-style cake with a golden-brown, lattice-patterned crust covering the top. The crust features a series of evenly spaced, interwoven strips, giving it a classic homemade appearance. The sides are smooth and slightly glossy, with a consistent color and texture, suggesting a well-baked exterior. The cake sits on a simple, white, flat plate that contrasts with the warm tones of the crust. There are no visible decorations, icing, or candles, and the surface is unadorned except for the lattice design. The overall look is rustic and traditional, reminiscent of a fruit pie or tart commonly found in bakeries or at urban outdoor markets.
description: A round, golden-brown lattice-topped pie cake on a white plate, with a rustic, unadorned appearance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the lattice crust pattern clearly, with the scalloped edge and smooth side visible.
description_view_1: This view highlights the evenness of the lattice pattern and the uniform, glossy side of the cake.
description_view_2: The lattice top and scalloped edge are visible, with a slight angle showing the cake's thickness.
description_view_3: Back view emphasizes the continuous lattice pattern and the unbroken, smooth side surface.
